established_patterns.deps_struct: actionUpdateDeps pkg/cli/update_actions.go:37. Successor to test-seam global vars. Field-of-funcs, defaultDeps() ctor, threaded through funcs. Tests overwrite fields. R17 adopted.
established_patterns.init_ok: analyzer reg, wasm override, embedded JSON, map deriv. NOT log-only stubs
established_patterns.mutex_unlock: defer mu.Unlock ~85%. Manual ok for release-before-slow-call
established_patterns.syscall_discard_def: Defensible IFF (a)callee logs (b)best-effort doc (c)error-cleanup defer w/primary err (d)impossible-at-init. #aw_sg14a1 meets NONE
established_patterns.implicit_defer_anti: `defer fn(args)` returning err implicitly discards. Fix: `defer func(){ _ = fn(args) }()`
established_patterns.errors_is_idiom: errors.Is even for stdlib-unwrapped (context.Canceled, io.EOF). R16: 100%
established_patterns.build_tag_dup_anti: Pure-value decls duped across !js,!wasm vs js||wasm should hoist to untagged. Ex: ErrNpmNotAvailable→npm_validation_errors.go (R16)
established_patterns.iife_init_ok: `var X = func()T{}()` trailing-invoke OK (stores result). Ex: pkg/constants/tool_constants.go:72,102
established_patterns.test_seam_fnvar_anti: `var X = func(...) (...) { return realFn(...) }` antipattern. ID: (1)'replaced in tests' doc (2)`orig:=X;defer{X=orig}` (3)forwards to real fn. Fix: deps struct. RESOLVED R17.
established_patterns.panic_def: Idiomatic panic patterns: (a)sync.Once.Do init-load embedded JSON (b)BUG: prefix unreachable (c)init() reg failures (d)defence-in-depth precond. Linter doesn't differentiate — #aw_sg17a1.
established_patterns.named_duration: Sleep policies in named time.Duration constants near call site. Ex: APICallCooldown, backupCleanupRetryDelay, timestampDifferentiationDelay. Magic literals = #aw_sg17a2.
established_patterns.ci_linter_enforce: cgo.yml:1040 uses POSITIVE selector LINTER_FLAGS="-X -test=false" enabling X only. Others non-blocking (lint-monster auto-fix). To enforce new analyzer: append `-name` to LINTER_FLAGS.
